assertions.description: Output includes one prompt per requested format with aspect ratio, pixel dimensions, platform label, and composition note explaining how this version differs
Text-safe zones are specified for every format
A shared style anchor string is provided and a generation sequence recommendation explains the logic

assertion_results.note: Three format prompts each with ratio, dimensions, platform, and composition rationale
Text-safe zones specified for all three formats
Shared anchor and sequence: generate square first (most compositionally specific)
Two format prompts with proper specifications
Text-safe zones for both header and social card
Four format prompts including LinkedIn banner at 4:1
Text-safe zones for all four formats
Shared anchor; sequence starts with square for seed establishment

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
